name: Bitcoin Core
description: The reference Bitcoin node. Validates the blockchain and exposes the RPC API.

inputs.label: RPC user
inputs.help: Username for the bitcoind RPC API.

inputs.label: RPC password
inputs.help: Password for the RPC API. Stored encrypted.

inputs.label: Prune target (MB)
inputs.help: 0 = full node (keep every block). To prune, set a size in MB — minimum 550, e.g. 10000 ≈ 10 GB. Pruning requires Tx index = 0 and is NOT compatible with Electrs/Mempool (they need the full chain).

inputs.label: Transaction index (txindex)
inputs.help: 1 = on, needed by Electrs/Mempool (full node only). Set 0 when pruning — txindex and pruning cannot be used together.

compose:
name: "slashnode-bitcoind"
services:
  bitcoind:
    image: "bitcoin/bitcoin:28.1"
    container_name: "bitcoind"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    entrypoint: "bitcoind"
    command:
      - "-datadir=/home/bitcoin/.bitcoin"
      - "-server=1"
      - "-prune=${input.PRUNE_MB}"
      - "-txindex=${input.TXINDEX}"
      - "-rpcbind=0.0.0.0"
      - "-rpcallowip=0.0.0.0/0"
      - "-rpcuser=${input.RPC_USER}"
      - "-rpcpassword=${secret.RPC_PASSWORD}"
      - "-zmqpubrawblock=tcp://0.0.0.0:28332"
      - "-zmqpubrawtx=tcp://0.0.0.0:28333"
    ports:
      - "8333:8333"
      - "127.0.0.1:8332:8332"
    volumes:
      - "bitcoin-data:/home/bitcoin/.bitcoin"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  bitcoin-data:
    name: "slashnode-bitcoind_bitcoind_bitcoin-data"
notes: Pruning: set 'Prune target (MB)' (min 550, e.g. 10000 ≈ 10 GB) AND set 'Transaction index' to 0 — bitcoind refuses to start with both pruning and txindex. A pruned node saves disk but cannot back Electrs / Mempool (those need the full chain + txindex=1).
